metadata.title: File Tree Alternative
metadata.description: This plugin allows you to have an alternative file tree view.

regex.source: .setName('Include Files From Subfolders to the File List')
regex.target: .setName('将子文件夹中的文件包含到文件列表中')

regex.source: .setName('Toggle Button for Include Files from Subfolders')
regex.target: .setName('用于从子文件夹中包含文件的切换按钮')

regex.source: .setName('Reveal Active File in File Tree Button')
regex.target: .setName('“在文件树中显示活动文件”按钮')

regex.source: .setName('All & Tag Search only in Focused Folder')
regex.target: .setName('仅在焦点文件夹中进行所有标签搜索')

regex.source: .setName('Fixed Buttons and Header in File Pane')
regex.target: .setName('文件窗格中的固定按钮和标题')

regex.source: .setDesc('Turn on if you want to see the folders and files in a single view without switching between views. Similar experience to Evernote.')
regex.target: .setDesc('如果要在单个视图中查看文件夹和文件而不在视图之间切换，请启用此选项。与印象笔记类似的体验。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Turn on if you want Ribbon Icon for activating the File Tree.')
regex.target: .setDesc('如果希望使用功能区图标激活文件树，请启用此选项。')

regex.source: .setDesc("Turn off if you don't want file tree view to be opened automatically during vault start")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果不希望在库启动期间自动打开文件树视图，请关闭此选项")

regex.source:
.setDesc('This will enable to reveal file or folder from core bookmarks plugin.' +
            'Because there is no API yet to overwrite the default behaviour for Bookmarks plugin,' +
            'this will add an event to reveal file if you click on bookmark name using shift')
regex.target:
.setDesc('这将允许从核心书签插件中显示文件或文件夹。' +
            '由于还没有API来覆盖Bookmarks插件的默认行为，' +
            '如果您使用shift单击书签名称，这将添加一个事件来显示文件')

regex.source: .setDesc('Change the default folder icons your preferred option')
regex.target: .setDesc('更改您首选的默认文件夹图标')

regex.source: .setDesc(`Turn on if you want your Root Folder "${this.plugin.app.vault.getName()}" to be visible in the file tree`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`如果你想要你的根文件夹，请打开 "${this.plugin.app.vault.getName()}" 在文件树中可见`)

regex.source: .setDesc('Turn on if you want see the number of notes/files under file tree.')
regex.target: .setDesc('如果要查看文件树下的笔记/文件数量，请启用此选项。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Select which files you want to be included into count')
regex.target: .setDesc('选择要包含在计数中的文件')

regex.source: .setDesc(`Turn on this option if you want to see the list of files from all subfolders in addition to the selected folder`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`如果您想查看除所选文件夹外的所有子文件夹中的文件列表，请启用此选项`)

regex.source: .setDesc(`Turn on this option if you want to have an additional button on the top of the file list to toggle "Include Files From Subfolders"`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`如果您想在文件列表顶部有一个额外的按钮来切换，请启用此选项 "包含子文件夹中的文件"`)

regex.source: .setDesc(`Turn on this option if you want to have an additional button to reveal the active file in the file tree. It will set the folder and file pane accordingly.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`如果您想有一个额外的按钮来显示文件树中的活动文件，请启用此选项。它将相应地设置文件夹和文件窗格。`)

regex.source: .setDesc(`Turn on this option if you want to enable search function to filter files by name.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`如果要启用按名称筛选文件的搜索功能，请启用此选项。`)

regex.source: .setDesc(`"all:" and "tag:" searches by default looks for all files in your vault. Turn on this option if you want search only in Focused Folder`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`"all:" 和 "tag:" 默认情况下，搜索会查找库中的所有文件。如果您只想在聚焦文件夹中搜索，请启用此选项`)

regex.source: .setDesc('Turn on if you want to file icon before the file name in the file list.')
regex.target: .setDesc('如果要在文件列表中的文件名前显示文件图标，请启用此选项。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Turn on if you want to preview the files once you hover on them within the file list holding Ctrl/Cmd button.')
regex.target: .setDesc('如果您想在按住 Ctrl/Cmd 按钮的文件列表中将鼠标悬停在文件上后预览文件，请启用此选项。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Turn on if you want buttons and header to be not scrolled within the file list.')
regex.target: .setDesc('如果您不希望按钮和标题在文件列表中滚动，请启用此选项。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Turn on if you want to see the full path within the file name list rather than only file name')
regex.target: .setDesc('如果您想查看文件名列表中的完整路径，而不仅仅是文件名，请启用此选项')

regex.source: .setDesc('Select where you want files to be moved once they are deleted')
regex.target: .setDesc('选择文件删除后要移动到的位置')

regex.source: .setDesc('Turn on if you want plugin to include created YAML key with the time of creation')
regex.target: .setDesc('选择文件删除后要移动到的位置')

regex.source: .setDesc('Turn on if you want plugin to add the initial file name as main header in the created file.')
regex.target: .setDesc('如果您希望插件在创建的文件中将初始文件名添加为主标题，请启用此选项。')

regex.source: .setDesc(`It will hide "attachments" folder from the view and any file under this folder from the file list`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`它会隐藏 "附件" 从视图中删除文件夹，并从文件列表中删除此文件夹下的任何文件`)

regex.source:
.setDesc(`Provide extension of files, which you want to exclude from listing in file tree, divided by comma. i.e. 'png, pdf, jpeg'.
            You need to reload the vault or use "Reload File Tree" button below to make changes effective.`)
regex.target:
.setDesc(`提供要从文件树列表中排除的文件的扩展名，用逗号分隔。 例如 'png, pdf, jpeg'.
            您需要重新加载库或使用 "重新加载文件树" 单击下面的按钮使更改生效。`)

regex.source: .setDesc('Use this button to reload the file tree. Reloading the file tree is required for some of the settings. You can also restart your vault to have same effect.')
regex.target: .setDesc('使用此按钮重新加载文件树。某些设置需要重新加载文件树。您也可以重新启动vault以获得相同的效果。')

regex.source: .setDesc(`This button will clear the pinned files in the file list pane.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`此按钮将清除文件列表窗格中的固定文件。`)

regex.source: .setTooltip('Click here to reload the file tree')
.setTooltip('Click here to clear the cache data')
.setTooltip('Click here to clear the pinned files')
.createEl('p', { text: 'The settings below are only applicable if the plus (+) button within the file pane of the plugin is used.' })
regex.target: .createEl('p', { text: '以下设置仅适用于使用插件文件窗格中的加号（+）按钮的情况。' })

regex.source: .setDesc(`Turn this option on if you want to create Folder Note same as Folder Note Plugin.
regex.target: .setDesc(`如果要创建与文件夹注释插件相同的文件夹注释，请启用此选项。

regex.source: By default, Click will open the list of files. You need to use "Shift+Click" to open the folder note. If folder has a folder note,
regex.target: 默认情况下，单击将打开文件列表。您需要使用“Shift+Click”打开文件夹注释。如果文件夹有文件夹注释，

regex.source: you will see an arrow icon on the right side of folder. The note created as a folder note is hidden in the file list.`)
regex.target: 您将在文件夹的右侧看到一个箭头图标。作为文件夹注释创建的注释隐藏在文件列表中。`)

regex.source: .setDesc(`Provide full path of folders, which you want to exclude from listing in file tree, divided by comma. i.e. 'Personal/Attachments, Work/Documents/Folders'.
regex.target: .setDesc(`提供要从文件树列表中排除的文件夹的完整路径，用逗号分隔。即 'Personal/Attachments, Work/Documents/Folders'.

regex.source: All subfolders are going to be excluded, as well. You need to reload the vault or use "Reload File Tree" button below to make changes effective.`)
regex.target: 所有子文件夹也将被排除在外。您需要重新加载vault或使用下面的 "重新加载文件树" 按钮使更改生效。`)

regex.source: .setDesc(`This button will clear the following cache data: "Last position of the divider" & "List of expanded folders in the folder pane",
regex.target: .setDesc(`此按钮将清除以下缓存数据: "分隔器的最后位置" & "文件夹窗格中展开的文件夹列表",

regex.source: & "Last active folder path". It will not touch your settings above and list of pinned files. It is recommended to do this clearing once in a while.`)
regex.target: & "文件夹窗格中展开的文件夹列表". 它不会触及您上面的设置和固定文件列表。建议偶尔进行一次清理。`)
